scripts.build:
rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && for d in */ ; do if [ -f "$d/package.json" ]; then P_NAME=${d%/}; echo "Building $P_NAME..."; cd "$d" && npm install && NUXT_APP_BASE_URL=/$P_NAME/ NUXT_NITRO_PRESET=netlify npm run build && cd .. && cp -r "$d/.output/public/." "dist/$P_NAME/"; fi; done && echo '

My Nuxt Projects

    ' > dist/index.html && for d in dist/*/; do NAME=$(basename "$d"); echo "
  • $NAME
    • " >> dist/index.html; done && echo '
' >> dist/index.html
